{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211412457291D1D2A9D757D9790A"}"},"total":356},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7590423097018106648","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容很大胆，很吸引人，作者有些会偷懒总是会复制让“皇帝”去重复那几句话像“哈哈哈”“这才是我真正的对手判官”这种类似的话，我反应回来的时候应该是出现三次了？[什么]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767288619,"group_id":"7560284553810545726","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望我会写出好的作品","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N80FulRegYkB/JvOZJ1rZ2/kS7Zlj8DWY/36T+9yO4PI","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7540cac3d2984bcd99ff52c9c9794a7f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616704&x-signature=xe9ryIIDbtIOtcCgywA9JL%2Fvbdk%3D","user_id":"1904790034186631","user_name":"墨绿色的竹子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1904790034186631","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7560284553810545726","book_info":{"abstract":"警校之耻陈默，理论满分，实践零分，毕业被当皮球踢进无人问津的冷案档案室。
同事当他混子，领导视他废物，警花学霸更是不屑一顾。
然而无人知晓，他是一名从生死对决中穿越而来的顶级犯罪心理学家！
当他触摸到第一份尘封的卷宗，【罪恶共鸣】系统激活！
【思维同步】，他能亲历凶案现场！
【心跳定位】，凶手在他面前无所遁形！
“十年前校园女尸案？凶手是那个洁癖清洁工。”
“雨夜屠夫连环案？去查查城东的宠物标本馆。”
“富商密室被杀案？门是反锁的，我能画出作案工具。”
当一件件悬案被他弹指告破，整个警界都为之疯狂！
“求求了！陈默，快来当神探吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/225364aaa744ea86d86be213bfd8c81b","author":"无敌码字系统","author_id":"","book_id":"7560284553810545726","book_name":"发配冷案组，我成了绝世神探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7560284583258751550","read_count":"31701","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"846092"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"371","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,系统,穿越,推理,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ea3bec8c7ae0e47dc41980b36f0d8408~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257566&x-signature=MT669x55ABHvcyB2uzAjTsQkIWU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3606829549756084","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211412457291D1D2A9D757D9790A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration"
